recommendations.title: The Rewrite
recommendations.overview: An Oscar-winning writer in a slump leaves Hollywood to teach screenwriting at a college on the East Coast, where he falls for a single mom taking classes there.

recommendations.title: The Shipping News
recommendations.overview: An emotionally-beaten man with his young daughter moves to his ancestral home in Newfoundland to reclaim his life.

recommendations.title: The Big Easy
recommendations.overview: Remy McSwain is a New Orleans police lieutenant who investigates the murder of a local mobster. His investigation leads him to suspect that fellow members of the police force may be involved.

recommendations.title: Turning Red
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Mei is experiencing the awkwardness of being a teenager with a twist – when she gets too excited, she transforms into a giant red panda.
